visualGoal: Turn the intimidating 'connect your launch monitor to GSPro' step into a clear one-subscription, one-connection-path, one-wireless-decision workflow. Real launch-monitor product proof for every unit on the connector map; no procedural art.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic home golf simulator bay with a Windows gaming PC beside the hitting area, a glowing course on the impact screen, warm gold light on deep green walls, open product-overlay space beside the tee for a real launch monitor, cabling running from sensor to PC to suggest the wired-connection theme, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake launch monitor, fake software UI, warped screen, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: How your launch monitor reaches GSPro
content: Built-in GSPro Connect / OpenAPI (Foresight, Uneekor, FlightScope, Full Swing, ProTee)
Vendor connector app runs alongside GSPro (Rapsodo, Garmin R10)
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center flow chart, four labeled lanes, large readable text, golf greens/golds, real LM photos as lane markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: GSPro: cost, PC bar, and the dropout fix
content: $250/yr subscription, Windows only, no perpetual license
1 TB NVMe SSD practical floor for the LiDAR course library
Dropouts = go wired, shorten distance, clear 2.4 GHz, test first
infographicPrompts.style: Two-column spec + checklist card, large readable text, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf curator Nina Brooks at a home simulator PC beside the hitting bay, one hand gesturing at a launch monitor, confident setup-guide energy, product overlay space beside her, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.need: GSPro Settings Reload Courses + Local Match 'Show All Courses' toggle
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: The most common 'I downloaded a course and it's missing' fix. If a real GSPro UI screenshot is used it must be a genuine capture, not a fabricated UI; otherwise keep it as text instruction. Low priority.

openQuestions: Do we want a genuine GSPro UI screenshot for the Reload Courses / Show All Courses step, or keep it as text-only instruction to avoid fabricated-UI risk?
Confirm whether the Rapsodo official GSPro direct-connect (2025) has fully replaced the community MLM2PRO connector, or both remain in use?
